name: ditto-local
description: Local marketplace hosting the ditto plugin — an intent / verification / completion harness for Claude Code (deep interview, autopilot graph, dialectic review, convergence gates).

plugins.name: ditto
plugins.description: Intent / verification / completion harness for Claude Code (deep interview, autopilot graph, dialectic review, convergence gates). source="./" — the repo root IS the plugin root. Install is github-source: this marketplace is registered from the repo and the plugin loads from "./". Local dev loads the same surface without a marketplace via `claude --plugin-dir dist/plugin`.
